prompt: A vertical anime-inspired wedding key visual poster that blends live-action cosplay-style newlyweds in the foreground with illustrated anime girls surrounding them, set in front of a sunlit stone church under a brilliant deep blue sky. In the center foreground, a bride and groom pose for a dramatic selfie-like shot with their arms reaching toward the viewer. The groom is a youthful androgynous character with light brown shaggy short hair, wearing a crisp white wedding suit, white shirt, and white tie, smiling and making a playful hand sign near his face. The bride has dark purple-black hair in short twin tails and wears an ornate white wedding dress with layered lace, veil, pearl choker, long white gloves, and holds a bouquet of white roses. Behind them rises a beautiful European-style church with a tall steeple, floral garlands over the entrance, stained glass, and warm sunlight bursting from the left side, creating lens flare and sparkling highlights. The sky is filled with fluffy white clouds, flying white birds, a faint rainbow streak, and drifting pink flower petals. Around the edges are 6 anime schoolgirl portraits in dark school uniforms with red or yellow ribbon bows, each showing a different emotional expression: top left brown-haired girl reaching forward, upper left purple-haired girl with an eyepatch looking flustered, lower left pink-haired cheerful girl, top right brown-haired girl extending a gloved hand, mid-right dark-haired boy in school uniform, lower right brown-haired shy girl, and bottom right small blonde girl with an excited open-mouth expression. Add ornate decorative corner filigree framing the poster. Include vertical Japanese tagline text on the upper right reading さあ、契約の時間だ— 私たちの永遠を誓おう. Place a large colorful Japanese title across the bottom center reading 中二病でも恋がしたい！ in bold blue and pink outlined typography, with a small romanized subtitle beneath it reading "Chu-2 byo demo KOI ga shitai!" and small credits near the bottom reading 富樫勇太　小鳥遊六花. Overall look: dazzling, romantic, sentimental, nostalgic anime movie poster, ultra-detailed, glossy lighting, magical sparkle effects, vivid colors, polished promotional composition.
